latestPosts.caption:
So happy to share this moment! I’ve closed many deals before, but this one will always hold a special place in my heart. ❤️

A huge thank you to Manpreet Ma’am @manpreet.kirpa , Priyanka @priyanka.kirpa and Akshay @akshay.kirpa for believing in me and supporting me throughout this journey.

Closed in Emmar - One who built Burj khalifa 🙏🏻❤️

It truly feels like a dream come true. I had been manifesting becoming a part of the Kirpa Army, and today that dream has become a reality.

Grateful to my parents, the universe, and everyone who has been a part of this journey. Here’s to new beginnings! ✨🙏
